_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: We observed similar patterns of γH2AX foci formation and resolution over time in WT and Nf1 mutant mouse embryo fibroblasts
details: Successfully detected γH2AX foci formation and resolution patterns in WT and Nf1 mutant MEFs exposed to low dose irradiation
